TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Uzbekistan, title = Uzbekistan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uzbekistan} }

S.FORM: Uzbekistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 41 00 N, 64 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 447,400 sq km (maki' tay 57ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 425,400 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 22,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 29,473,614. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga62.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 7.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 29.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Tashkent. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Shavkat Mirziyoyev, aring ryax 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Uzbekistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 41 00 N, 64 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 447,400 sq km (maki' tay 57ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 425,400 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 22,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 29,473,614. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga62.60% , lhlahuy hya' ga 7.70%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 29.70%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Tashkent. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mqiru' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Shavkat Mirziyoyev, aring ryax 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: uző≤ekis~…ētan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a tas~…ēńßkent. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mqiru Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēńßa*kat mirzijoje*, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
